name: Cinnamon-Raisin Breakfast Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Oil baking sheets.
3. Blend tofu until smooth. Add apple juice and 3 tbsp maple syrup; blend thoroughly.
4. Transfer mixture to a mixing bowl and set aside.
5. Sift together the remaining ingredients (baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, walnuts, raisins).
6. Fold the sifted ingredients into the tofu mixture until fully incorporated.
7. Gently stir in the chopped walnuts and raisins.
8. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and form into a ball.
9. Roll out dough to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut with a cookie cutter.
10. Brush remaining syrup over cutouts, if desired.
11. Bake for 12 minutes. Serve immediately.
